name: Zerodha Palindrome Validation Suite
scenario: Zerodha's compliance team validates symmetric transaction patterns. Build a palindrome analysis suite for trade sequence validation.

core.description: isPalindrome(String s): O(1) space two-pointer. Skip non-alphanumeric, case-insensitive. Test: 'A man, a plan, a canal: Panama' → true.
longestPalinSubstring(String s): expand around 2n-1 centers. O(n²) O(1). Test: 'babad' → 'bab' or 'aba'. 'cbbd' → 'bb'.
validPalindromeII(String s): at most one deletion. Try both sides on mismatch. Test: 'abca' → true. 'abc' → false.
countPalinSubstrings(String s): count all palindromic substrings. Test: 'aaa' → 6.
README: explains why we check 2n-1 centers (not just n).

bonus.description: longestPalinSubsequence(String s): LCS(s, rev(s)) O(n²). Test: 'bbbab' → 4.
canPermutePalindrome(String s): at most 1 odd-frequency char. Test: 'carrace' → true.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. Expand around center: try expand(s,i,i) for odd AND expand(s,i,i+1) for even — always both. Expand stops when s.charAt(lo)!=s.charAt(hi). Palindrome returned is s.substring(lo+1, hi) after the loop exits. ValidPalindromeII: on first mismatch at (lo,hi), call isPalindrome(s, lo+1, hi) OR isPalindrome(s, lo, hi-1). One deletion means one of these must be palindrome. LPS = LCS(s, rev(s)): same recurrence as LCS, just compare s and its reverse. MinInsertions = n - LPS.
